heading: You need to apply for help with your counterclaim fee
youNeedToApplyBeforeContinuing: You need to apply for Help with Fees (opens in new tab) before you can continue with this counterclaim.
enterCourtFormNumber: Enter the court form number 'XXX' when asked. This will be one of the first questions when you apply for help with your fees.
afterYouHaveApplied: After you have applied you will receive a Help with Fees reference number. You should enter the reference number when you return to this counterclaim.
ifYouReceiveAnyBenefit: If you receive any benefit that qualifies you for Help with Fees, you must include evidence of it when you apply online for Help with Fees.
ifYouHaveYourHWFReference: If you have your Help with Fees reference number, you can enter it now.
